description_long: This snowman features a rounded white body with two distinct snowball segments, the lower one being larger and adorned with three golden buttons. Its head is decorated with a wide-brimmed brown hat, giving it a rustic appearance. The face is detailed with two coal eyes, a carrot-shaped nose, and a dotted stick mouth, all arranged in a friendly expression. A red scarf is wrapped around its neck, draping down the front and side, adding a splash of color. The arms are represented by thin, branching sticks extending outward from the body. The overall look is classic and festive, suitable for placement in parks, sidewalks, or urban green spaces during winter.
description: A classic snowman with a brown wide-brimmed hat, red scarf, stick arms, and a friendly coal-and-carrot face. Its body features two snowball segments and golden buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the snowman's face, red scarf, golden buttons, and both stick arms extended.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the hat, scarf, and one stick arm, with no facial features visible.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the profile of the hat, scarf, and both stick arms, with the carrot nose and part of the face visible.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the hat, scarf, and a single stick arm, with no facial features or buttons visible.
